microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized deployment system, standardizing integration workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining API-driven self-service scheduling that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled teams to own their own deployment lifecycle end-to-end.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable validation pattern across sovereign-cloud environments.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility and debugging live production issues in real time.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill throughput by 21%, turning one-off solutions into reusable runbooks adopted across the team.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven workflows** by conducting user demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and embedding the tooling into core development pipelines.

Drove roadmap prioritization for intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with engineering stakeholders, translating field pain points into scoped product requirements delivered to the core platform team.

Accelerated data retrieval and onboarding by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing friction for new integration workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, translating stakeholder pain points into a deployable roadmap.

Scoped 81 hours of per-region manual toil through discovery sessions with 20+ service teams, then built and shipped a **custom data pipeline roadmap** to automate critical-path tasks and reduce deployment friction at scale.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a real-time view of automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of high-impact integration work.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and debugging integration failures before production cutover.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and creating reusable deployment patterns for future rollouts.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and keep the migration on schedule.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping, configuration, and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a structured CRM workflow that eliminated manual handoffs and accelerated customer onboarding.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversion rate by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search profiles to surface the right customers faster.

Improved leadership pricing accuracy by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and closing margin leaks and delivering actionable financial insights that shaped downstream pricing strategy.
